reviews.review_description: But will more content  be added?  it's kinda buggy as well, please fix!  Oh yea can you add background environments to fill the main environment?

developer_response.body: Hi @Aaronb3434 thank you so much for your feedback. Yes, more content will be added in the coming update. Also, we have something really interesting coming up that will just blow your mind❤️. Please stay tuned and give your valuable feedback. Much appreciated!
